SELECT f.id AS "Id", f.library_id AS "LibraryId", l.library_name AS "LibraryName", f.transaction_type AS "TransactionType", f.amount AS "Amount", f.paid_amount AS "PaidAmount", f.remaining_amount AS "RemainingAmount", f.description AS "Description", f.transaction_date AS "TransactionDate", f.due_date AS "DueDate", f.status AS "Status", f.created_by_admin_user_id AS "CreatedByAdminUserId", a.username AS "CreatedByAdminUsername", f.created_by_library_account_id AS "CreatedByLibraryAccountId", l0.username AS "CreatedByLibraryUsername", f.created_at AS "CreatedAt", f.updated_at AS "UpdatedAt"

WHERE f.library_id = @__libraryId_0

SELECT f.id AS "Id", f.library_id AS "LibraryId", l.library_name AS "LibraryName", f.transaction_type AS "TransactionType", f.amount AS "Amount", f.paid_amount AS "PaidAmount", f.remaining_amount AS "RemainingAmount", f.description AS "Description", f.transaction_date AS "TransactionDate", f.due_date AS "DueDate", f.status AS "Status", f.created_by_admin_user_id AS "CreatedByAdminUserId", a.username AS "CreatedByAdminUsername", f.created_by_library_account_id AS "CreatedByLibraryAccountId", l0.username AS "CreatedByLibraryUsername", f.created_at AS "CreatedAt", f.updated_at AS "UpdatedAt"

SELECT f.id AS "Id", f.library_id AS "LibraryId", l.library_name AS "LibraryName", f.transaction_type AS "TransactionType", f.amount AS "Amount", f.paid_amount AS "PaidAmount", f.remaining_amount AS "RemainingAmount", f.description AS "Description", f.transaction_date AS "TransactionDate", f.due_date AS "DueDate", f.status AS "Status", f.created_by_admin_user_id AS "CreatedByAdminUserId", a.username AS "CreatedByAdminUsername", f.created_by_library_account_id AS "CreatedByLibraryAccountId", l0.username AS "CreatedByLibraryUsername", f.created_at AS "CreatedAt", f.updated_at AS "UpdatedAt"

INNER JOIN libraries AS l ON f.library_id = l.id

SELECT count(*)::int AS "TotalLogs", count(*) FILTER (WHERE a0.operation_date >= @__today_1)::int AS "TodayLogs", count(*) FILTER (WHERE a0.status = 'succeeded')::int AS "SuccessfulLogs", count(*) FILTER (WHERE a0.status = 'clienterror')::int AS "ClientErrors", count(*) FILTER (WHERE a0.status = 'blocked')::int AS "BlockedLogs", count(*) FILTER (WHERE a0.status = 'servererror')::int AS "ServerErrors", count(*) FILTER (WHERE a0.security_level = 'public')::int AS "PublicLogs", count(*) FILTER (WHERE a0.security_level = 'protected')::int AS "ProtectedLogs", count(*) FILTER (WHERE a0.security_level = 'privileged')::int AS "PrivilegedLogs", count(*) FILTER (WHERE a0.account_type = 'AdminUser')::int AS "AdminLogs", count(*) FILTER (WHERE a0.account_type = 'LibraryAccount')::int AS "LibraryLogs"
FROM (
    SELECT a.account_type, a.operation_date, a.security_level, a.status, 1 AS "Key"
    FROM audit_logs AS a
    WHERE a.status = @__query_Status_Value_0
) AS a0
GROUP BY a0."Key"

FROM (
    SELECT a.account_type, a.operation_date, a.security_level, a.status, 1 AS "Key"

SELECT f.id AS "Id", f.library_id AS "LibraryId", l.library_name AS "LibraryName", f.transaction_type AS "TransactionType", f.amount AS "Amount", f.paid_amount AS "PaidAmount", f.remaining_amount AS "RemainingAmount", f.description AS "Description", f.transaction_date AS "TransactionDate", f.due_date AS "DueDate", f.status AS "Status", f.created_by_admin_user_id AS "CreatedByAdminUserId", a.username AS "CreatedByAdminUsername", f.created_by_library_account_id AS "CreatedByLibraryAccountId", l0.username AS "CreatedByLibraryUsername", f.created_at AS "CreatedAt", f.updated_at AS "UpdatedAt"

LEFT JOIN admin_users AS a ON t.created_by_admin_user_id = a.id
WHERE f.library_id = @__libraryId_0
ORDER BY t.settlement_date DESC, t.id DESC

SELECT f.id AS "Id", f.library_id AS "LibraryId", l.library_name AS "LibraryName", f.transaction_type AS "TransactionType", f.amount AS "Amount", f.paid_amount AS "PaidAmount", f.remaining_amount AS "RemainingAmount", f.description AS "Description", f.transaction_date AS "TransactionDate", f.due_date AS "DueDate", f.status AS "Status", f.created_by_admin_user_id AS "CreatedByAdminUserId", a.username AS "CreatedByAdminUsername", f.created_by_library_account_id AS "CreatedByLibraryAccountId", l0.username AS "CreatedByLibraryUsername", f.created_at AS "CreatedAt", f.updated_at AS "UpdatedAt"
FROM financial_transactions AS f
INNER JOIN libraries AS l ON f.library_id = l.id
LEFT JOIN admin_users AS a ON f.created_by_admin_user_id = a.id
LEFT JOIN library_accounts AS l0 ON f.created_by_library_account_id = l0.id
WHERE f.library_id = @__libraryId_0
ORDER BY f.transaction_date DESC, f.id DESC
